caseRetryPolicy: If a final batch case lacked successful internal trace, the case was retried with a fresh OpenClaw session/idempotency key; only successful answer + successful internal trace rows are retained in final data.
judgeEndpointStatus: configured LLM judge endpoint unreachable by TCP timeout during final scoring; all final batches rescored with one consistent manual-review rubric
traceEvidencePolicy: required for every final case row
